parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{
      $json.user_id
      || $json.message?.from?.id
      || $json.callback_query?.from?.id
      || $json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id
      || $json.message?.chat?.id
    }}::BIGINT AS user_id,

    {{
      $json.chat_id
      || $json.message?.chat?.id
      || $json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id
      || $json.callback_query?.from?.id
      || $json.message?.from?.id
    }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
),

limit_row AS (
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    i.chat_id,
    COALESCE(l.hourly_limit, 10) AS hourly_limit,
    COALESCE(l.is_unlimited, FALSE) AS is_unlimited,
    COALESCE(l.plan, 'free') AS plan
  FROM input_data i
  LEFT JOIN gnote.ai_user_limits l
    ON l.user_id = i.user_id
),

usage_now AS (
  SELECT
    lr.*,
    COUNT(a.id)::INTEGER AS used_last_hour,
    MIN(a.created_at) AS first_usage_in_window
  FROM limit_row lr
  LEFT JOIN gnote.ai_usage_log a
    ON a.user_id = lr.user_id
   AND a.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
   AND a.status IN ('reserved', 'success')
  GROUP BY
    lr.user_id,
    lr.chat_id,
    lr.hourly_limit,
    lr.is_unlimited,
    lr.plan
)

SELECT
  user_id,
  chat_id,
  plan,
  hourly_limit,
  is_unlimited,
  used_last_hour,
  CASE
    WHEN is_unlimited = TRUE THEN NULL
    ELSE GREATEST(hourly_limit - used_last_hour, 0)
  END AS remaining_last_hour,
  COALESCE(
    first_usage_in_window + INTERVAL '1 hour',
    NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  ) AS reset_at
FROM usage_now;
